content.text: Are you going round in circles trying to get certified? Here's our recap of the AWS webinar!
Discover the shortest path to getting certified in the cloud era with our best practices.
Brant, our fearless CEO, and Kenny, our CIO, who never cease to amaze me with their wit, energy, and knowledge, will discuss ISMS, ISMS-P, and PIPA privacy laws, Zero-trust, IAM, SAML, and SSO.
